title: Lamb Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired lamb curry made with tender lamb, fresh spices, and a hint of charred flavor.

ingredients.name: Charred ginger
ingredients.notes: Charred over an open flame or in a broiler

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add charred ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add garam masala, curry powder, and salt. Cook for 1 minute.
Add diced tomatoes and chicken broth. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until lamb is tender, about 1 1/2 hours.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
